name: Hikari | Last days of mankind
description:
It's the future year of 1999. Earth has been invaded by an alien race known only as the Kodomo. With most of Asia and South America being occupied by the Kodomo, the last battle for mankind is taking place in Europe, in the mountains of Poland. NATO and the USSR have set aside their difference in hopes of stopping the tide of this alien invasion, but they're loosing.

And you're trapped in the middle of it. A crash landing leaves your injured when a woman appears to save your life. Will you survive?

These are the last days of mankind.
creator: Defaultknightmain
